name: @echatbot/database
description: Shared Prisma database client for eChatbot

scripts.build:seed: tsc prisma/seed.ts --outDir prisma/compiled --esModuleInterop --resolveJsonModule --skipLibCheck --module commonjs --target ES2020 --moduleResolution node
scripts.migrate:dev: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:dev in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:reset: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:reset in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- ts-node scripts/safe-reset.ts
scripts.migrate:reset:force: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run migrate:reset:force in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.seed: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run seed in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- ts-node prisma/seed.ts
scripts.seed:production: echo '⚠️  Running seed in PRODUCTION - use only for initial setup!' && node prisma/prisma/seed.js
scripts.db:push: if [ "$NODE_ENV" = "production" ]; then echo '❌ Cannot run db:push in production!' && exit 1; fi && dotenv -e ../../.env -- prisma db push
